entry.title: New: Bill 47 (Hawaiʻi County) — Adopted
entry.content:
AMENDS CHAPTER 6 OF THE HAWAIʻI COUNTY CODE 1983 (2016 EDITION, AS AMENDED), RELATING TO TRANSIENT ACCOMMODATIONS

Adds a new article requiring most transient vacation rentals and hosting platforms for transient vacation rentals to register with the County before operating; provides for enforcement and penalties.

Latest action: Council: Bill 47, Draft 3 passes second & final reading - 06/04/25

View on the council site
